violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Upper level of the hot hold unit, not used, was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors throughout the kitchen were found dirty. Light fixtures were also found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Time as a public health control. — --Food was not marked or identified with the time within which it must be cooked, served, or discarded. Sliced tomatoes, lettuce and sliced ham were found on the prep line without refrigeration and not marked with discard times. Sandwiches in hot hold area were also not marked. Potentially hazardous foods should be marked with disposition times when using time as a control.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the cooler in the coffee area was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Clean lids in the walk-in cooler were found stored in a dirty tote. Clean equipment should be stored in a clean location.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Single-service items above the fry hold area were found on dirty shelving. This area should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Flooring under equipment and ceiling tiles throughout the kitchen were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
